/CAL: PROGRESS REPORT RE SWAP PROGRAM & SURRENDER ON BALANCE OF CJ TIME/X:PROBATION OFFICER, NAKEISHA PEACOCK, APPEARS,/X:MS, PEACOCK INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE DEFT HAS MISSED THREE SESSIONS AND THAT IF THE DEFT MISSES ANOTHER SESSION, DEFT WILL BE TERMINATED FROM THE SWAP APPRENTICE PROGRAM,/PROB MOD:CJ TIME STAYED UNTIL PROGRAM IS COMPLETED,/X: IF DEFT COMPLETES THE SWAP APPRENTICE PROGRAM, THEN CJ TIME SHALL BE MODIFIED TO CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/X:IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE SWAP APPRENTICE PROGRAM, THEN THE DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE THE REMAINDER OF CJ TIME,/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT RE SWAP PROGRAM/DOPU:PROGRAM/

/CAL: SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT ON DA MTR/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REINORIG TC/PROB MOD/OR/X:ONE YEAR COUNTY JAIL STAYED TO 10-16-09,/PJ: 1 YEAR/ADDL CTS:30/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE 90 DAYS COUNTY JAIL THROUGH SWAPCONSTRUCTION APPRENTICE PROGRAM/SWAPD:08-10-09/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT RESWAP PROGRAM AND SURRENDER ON BALANCE OF COUNTY JAIL TIME/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/DISM3/IBARRA/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:11-21-08/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/X:DEFENDANT WAIVES 10TH DAY BUT NOT THE 60TH DAY/LD:07-14-08(60TH)/BAIL:35000/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF & JOIN 2288041 ON 05-23-08 IN DEPT 28/DOP/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP/CONTD:TO SET ON 06-09-08 IN DEPT 9/DOP/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE SWAP PROGRAM /CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENDANT TO SERVE BALANCE OF SENTENCE IN CUSTODY/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/PD/WIAMTR/SUPP:08-07-09/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/S28/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/
